Package io.vertigo.quarto.plugins.converter.xdocreport

Class XDocReportConverterPlugin.SnapshotBuiltinFont

java.lang.Object
com.lowagie.text.pdf.BaseFont
com.lowagie.text.pdf.Type3Font
io.vertigo.quarto.plugins.converter.xdocreport.XDocReportConverterPlugin.SnapshotBuiltinFont
Enclosing class:
XDocReportConverterPlugin
protected static final class XDocReportConverterPlugin.SnapshotBuiltinFont extends com.lowagie.text.pdf.Type3Font
Used to saved iText builtin font, overrided by xDocReport.
Author:
npiedeloup
